task: Enforce Turtle paper entry lock after delayed Alpaca fills

governance_bootstrap.summary: Trading changes require real runtime verification, explicit risk controls, and source-of-truth deployment.
Completion evidence must record runtime checks, deployment state, and unresolved review gaps.

changes: Preserved launchd environment controls instead of overriding them from .env.
Canceled timed-out Alpaca orders and re-polled terminal broker status.
Made health reports fail on active entry orders or positions outside the lock baseline.
Aligned current Turtle risk language to 1N sizing and no more than 2 percent loss at the 2N stop.

verification.name: Mac Mini Alpaca delayed-order incident trace
verification.result: META order was accepted with zero fill on 2026-07-10, remained open after timeout, filled later, and was adopted on 2026-07-13.

verification.name: Mac Mini stale paper entry order cancellation
verification.command: Cancel the two open DBC buy orders and query open buy orders again
verification.result: Two cancellation requests completed and the follow-up open buy order list was empty.

verification.name: launchd environment precedence check
verification.result: Observed max_positions=0 and pyramid=false after removing nested dotenv override behavior.

verification.name: focused trading regression suite
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_turtle_auto_trader_p0.py tests/test_turtle_auto_trader_p1.py tests/test_turtle_auto_trader_pyramid.py tests/test_turtle_strategy_core.py tests/test_ibkr_trader_b2.py tests/test_ibkr_turtle_monitor.py tests/test_ibkr_pending_orders.py tests/test_trading_universe.py tests/test_paper_trading_health_report.py
verification.result: 82 tests passed with one third-party asyncio deprecation warning.

verification.name: frontend production bundle build
verification.result: TypeScript and Vite production build passed; only the existing chunk-size warning remained.

residual_risk: META remains open with a resident protective stop; CEO disposition is required before liquidation.
Claude review failed because OAuth expired and Copilot review failed because authentication was absent; no red_team_clear is claimed.
